name: io.github.matiosera3-ops/defi-mcp
description: AI agent access to on-chain DeFi data on Polygon & Arbitrum: balances, positions, prices.

environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Polygon (e.g. from Alchemy or Infura)
environmentVariables.name: POLYGON_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: RPC URL for Arbitrum One (e.g. from Alchemy or Infura)
environmentVariables.name: ARBITRUM_RPC_URL
